blockingIssues.description: In horizon-aware paths, configurable burst/stagnation thresholds are effectively ignored because `effective_recency` overrides absolute thresholds with ~10% horizon width, so changing threshold fields does not affect behavior for tensions with a horizon.

`predict_structural_tendency` was changed from a 3-argument public API to a mandatory 4-argument API, introducing a backward-incompatible sd-core signature change against mission boundary constraints.

`PreviousDynamics` compensating-strategy fields were added but in that feature commit were copied from prior state instead of being updated from current-cycle computation, so VAL-EVT-014 was not fully satisfied in-feature.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit conflict-resolution rule for when milestone feature requirements require API-signature changes that contradict the global backward-compatibility boundary.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review sdcore-orientation-conflict-neglect-fixes flagged a blocking API break while the feature spec itself required signature changes elsewhere in this milestone, creating contradictory direction.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align validator scope guidance with mission-level validation policy (package-only vs workspace-wide) and require workers to state which policy they followed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review sdcore-gap-magnitude-hybrid observed AGENTS.md requires `cargo test --workspace` while skill guidance and handoffs commonly validate with `cargo test -p sd-core` only.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten procedural compliance reporting: if required steps (e.g., `cargo doc -p sd-core --no-deps`) were not run, `followedProcedure` must be false or include deviations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews (sdcore-structural-tension-now-param, sdcore-resolution-velocity-fix, sdcore-threshold-recalibration) observed handoffs marking followedProcedure=true while omitting required manual-verification commands.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify acceptable TDD evidence for algorithm-replacement/refactor work so RED-first expectations are explicit but practical.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews sdcore-gap-magnitude-hybrid and sdcore-new-event-types both reported test-first guidance drift during refactor-heavy work despite followedProcedure=true reporting.

rejectedObservations.observation: DateTime horizon width and effective_recency 1-second minimum behavior should be documented in shared library state.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected for now (library doc update not applied in this scrutiny run; defer to orchestrator prioritization)

rejectedObservations.observation: effective_recency ignores absolute thresholds when a horizon exists.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of blocking code-review finding already captured under blockingIssues

rejectedObservations.observation: Cargo doc step missing from handoffs.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate across multiple reviews; consolidated into one systemic guidance recommendation

rejectedObservations.observation: Strict RED-first sequence not followed in every feature.
